text.div:
Generated Narrative: MapaDeEstructura MINSA.RegistroPaciente.QRToPatient

map "http://minsa.gob.pe/immunizations/StructureMap/MINSA.RegistroPaciente.QRToPatient" = "MINSA.RegistroPaciente.QRToPatient"

uses "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/QuestionnaireResponse" alias QResp as source
uses "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Bundle" alias Bundle as target

imports "http://minsa.gob.pe/immunizations/StructureMap/MINSA.Helpers"

group RegistroPaciente(source src : QResp, target bundle : Bundle) {
  src ->  bundle.id = uuid(),  bundle.type = 'collection' "BundleStatic";
  src ->  bundle.entry as entry,  entry.resource = create('Patient') as patient,  bundle.entry as rpEntry,  rpEntry.resource = create('RelatedPerson') as caregiver,  bundle.entry as grpEntry,  grpEntry.resource = create('Group') as group then {
    src then ExtractPatient(src, patient) "ExtractPatient";
    src then ExtractCuidador(src, caregiver, patient) "ExtractCuidador";
    src then ExtractGroup(src, group, patient, caregiver) "ExtractGroup";
  } "BundleEntries";
}

// Extrae el recurso Patient (nino) del cuestionario
group ExtractPatient(source src : QResp, target patient : Patient) {
  src ->  patient.id = uuid(),  patient.active = true "PatientStatic";
  // DNI del nino
  src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-dni' then {
    item.answer first as answer then {
      answer.value as val -> patient.identifier = create('Identifier') as id then {
        val ->  id.use = 'official',  id.system = 'http://minsa.gob.pe/sid/dni',  id.value = val "SetDNIValues";
      } "CreateDNI";
    } "DNIAnswer";
  } "PatientDNI";
  // Nombre del nino
  src -> patient.name = create('HumanName') as name then {
    src -> name.use = 'official' "NameUse";
    src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-given-name' then {
      item.answer first as answer then {
        answer.value as val -> name.given = val "SetGivenName";
      } "GivenAnswer";
    } "GivenName";
    src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-second-name' then {
      item.answer first as answer then {
        answer.value as val -> name.given = val "SetSecondName";
      } "SecondNameAnswer";
    } "SecondName";
    src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-paternal-surname' then {
      item.answer first as answer then {
        answer.value as val -> name.family = val "SetPaternalSurname";
      } "PaternalAnswer";
    } "PaternalSurname";
  } "PatientName";
  // Fecha de nacimiento
  src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-birth-date' then {
    item.answer first as answer then {
      answer.value as val -> patient.birthDate = val "SetBirthDate";
    } "BirthDateAnswer";
  } "PatientBirthDate";
  // Sexo
  src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-gender' then {
    item.answer first as answer then {
      answer.value as coding then {
        coding.code as code -> patient.gender = code "SetGender";
      } "GenderCoding";
    } "GenderAnswer";
  } "PatientGender";
  // Direccion con Departamento, Provincia y Distrito
  src then ExtractAddress(src, patient) "PatientAddress";
}

// Extrae la direccion con extensiones de division administrativa peruana
group ExtractAddress(source src : QResp, target patient : Patient) {
  src -> patient.address = create('Address') as address then {
    src ->  address.use = 'home',  address.type = 'physical' "AddressStatic";
    // Texto libre de direccion
    src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-address-text' then {
      item.answer first as answer then {
        answer.value as val -> address.text = val "SetAddressText";
      } "AddressTextAnswer";
    } "AddressText";
    // Departamento
    src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-departamento' then {
      item.answer first as answer then {
        answer.value as coding -> address.extension = create('Extension') as ext then {
          coding -> ext.url = 'http://minsa.gob.pe/immunizations/StructureDefinition/MINSADepartamento' "SetDeptURL";
          coding -> ext.value = coding "SetDeptValue";
        } "CreateDeptExt";
      } "DeptAnswer";
    } "Departamento";
    // Provincia
    src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-provincia' then {
      item.answer first as answer then {
        answer.value as coding -> address.extension = create('Extension') as ext then {
          coding -> ext.url = 'http://minsa.gob.pe/immunizations/StructureDefinition/MINSAProvincia' "SetProvURL";
          coding -> ext.value = coding "SetProvValue";
        } "CreateProvExt";
      } "ProvAnswer";
    } "Provincia";
    // Distrito
    src.item as item where linkId = 'patient-distrito' then {
      item.answer first as answer then {
        answer.value as coding -> address.extension = create('Extension') as ext then {
          coding -> ext.url = 'http://minsa.gob.pe/immunizations/StructureDefinition/MINSADistrito' "SetDistURL";
          coding -> ext.value = coding "SetDistValue";
        } "CreateDistExt";
      } "DistAnswer";
    } "Distrito";
  } "PatientAddress";
}

// Extrae el recurso RelatedPerson (cuidador) del cuestionario
group ExtractCuidador(source src : QResp, target caregiver : RelatedPerson, source patient : Patient) {
  src ->  caregiver.id = uuid(),  caregiver.active = true,  caregiver.patient = reference(patient) "CaregiverStatic";
  // DNI del cuidador
  src.item as item where linkId = 'caregiver-dni' then {
    item.answer first as answer then {
      answer.value as val -> caregiver.identifier = create('Identifier') as id then {
        val ->  id.use = 'official',  id.system = 'http://minsa.gob.pe/sid/dni',  id.value = val "SetCaregiverDNIValues";
      } "CreateCaregiverDNI";
    } "CaregiverDNIAnswer";
  } "CaregiverDNI";
  // Nombre del cuidador
  src -> caregiver.name = create('HumanName') as name then {
    src -> name.use = 'official' "CaregiverNameUse";
    src.item as item where linkId = 'caregiver-given-name' then {
      item.answer first as answer then {
        answer.value as val -> name.given = val "SetCaregiverGivenName";
      } "CaregiverGivenAnswer";
    } "CaregiverGivenName";
    src.item as item where linkId = 'caregiver-paternal-surname' then {
      item.answer first as answer then {
        answer.value as val -> name.family = val "SetCaregiverFamilyName";
      } "CaregiverFamilyAnswer";
    } "CaregiverFamilyName";
  } "CaregiverName";
  // Telefono del cuidador
  src.item as item where linkId = 'caregiver-phone' then {
    item.answer first as answer then {
      answer.value as val -> caregiver.telecom = create('ContactPoint') as phone then {
        val ->  phone.system = 'phone',  phone.use = 'mobile',  phone.value = val "SetPhoneValues";
      } "CreatePhone";
    } "PhoneAnswer";
  } "CaregiverPhone";
  // Relacion de parentesco
  src.item as item where linkId = 'caregiver-relationship' then {
    item.answer first as answer then {
      answer.value as coding -> caregiver.relationship = create('CodeableConcept') as cc then {
        coding -> cc.coding = coding "SetRelCoding";
        coding.display as display -> cc.text = display "SetRelText";
      } "CreateRelCC";
    } "RelAnswer";
  } "CaregiverRelationship";
}

// Crea un Group que vincula al cuidador con el paciente
group ExtractGroup(source src : QResp, target group : Group, source patient : Patient, source caregiver : RelatedPerson) {
  src ->  group.id = uuid(),  group.type = 'person',  group.actual = true,  group.active = true "GroupStatic";
  src -> group.name = 'Familia' "GroupName";
  src -> group.member = create('Group_Member') as memberPatient then {
    patient -> memberPatient.entity = reference(patient) "SetPatientMember";
  } "PatientMember";
  src -> group.member = create('Group_Member') as memberCaregiver then {
    caregiver -> memberCaregiver.entity = reference(caregiver) "SetCaregiverMember";
  } "CaregiverMember";
}

name: MINSA.RegistroPaciente.QRToPatient
publisher: MINSA - Ministerio de Salud del Perú

contact.name: MINSA - Ministerio de Salud del Perú

group.name: ExtractPatient
group.documentation: Extrae el recurso Patient (nino) del cuestionario

group.name: ExtractAddress
group.documentation: Extrae la direccion con extensiones de division administrativa peruana

group.name: ExtractCuidador
group.documentation: Extrae el recurso RelatedPerson (cuidador) del cuestionario

group.name: ExtractGroup
group.documentation: Crea un Group que vincula al cuidador con el paciente
